user.title: Olimpia Splendid Unico
user.description: Choose how to add your device.

manual_ip.title: Manual Connection
manual_ip.description: Enter the device IP. Optionally paste the credentials JSON from the BLE pairing tool output (~/.olimpia/IP.json), or leave empty to load from disk.

ble_scan.title: BLE Device Scan
ble_scan.description: Select the Olimpia Splendid device found via Bluetooth.

ble_pin.title: BLE Pairing
ble_pin.description: Enter the device PIN and WiFi credentials.

ble_pairing.title: Pairing in progress
ble_pairing.description: BLE pairing and WiFi configuration in progress. This may take up to 60 seconds.

error.no_credentials: No credentials found. Run the BLE pairing tool first (see tools/ in the repository), then paste the JSON content above or copy the file to ~/.olimpia/ on your HA machine.
error.invalid_credentials_json: Invalid credentials JSON. Paste the full contents of the ~/.olimpia/IP.json file generated by the BLE pairing tool.
error.ble_no_devices: No Olimpia Splendid devices found via BLE

abort.ble_pairing_failed: BLE pairing failed. Check the device is in pairing mode and try again.
